message:
fix(json): improve arena pool size matching

Check buffer.len instead of just DEFAULT_SIZE for pool reuse

files.patch:

     LtLtEq, // <<=
     GtGtEq, // >>=
     ColonEq, // Walrus operator :=
+    AtEq, // Matrix multiplication @=
 
     // Delimiters
     LParen,
